name: atlas-vivo-integration-apis
description: ATLAS VIVO - Integration APIs for complete automation

scripts.test:orcid: node -e "const {ORCIDAPI} = require('./orcid_api_integration.js'); console.log('ORCID API:', new ORCIDAPI({clientId: process.env.ORCID_CLIENT_ID, clientSecret: process.env.ORCID_CLIENT_SECRET}).getStats());"
scripts.test:github: node -e "const {GitHubAPI} = require('./github_api_integration.js'); console.log('GitHub API:', new GitHubAPI({token: process.env.GITHUB_TOKEN}).getStats());"

author: Eduardo Mauricio / Associação MILK
